title: Add WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility basics — ARIA labels, focus-visible, skip-nav
description: Add WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility basics to The Lab dashboard. Add ARIA labels to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, tabs). Implement focus-visible styles for keyboard navigation. Add skip-nav link for screen readers. Ensure color contrast ratios meet AA standards (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text).
deferred_reason: Sprint 5 close-out: Accessibility work is important but not Sprint 5 critical path. Kevin de Bruyne overloaded. Deferred to Sprint 6 where it can receive dedicated focus.

2026-02-28T00:00:00Z.detail: Deferred per Sprint 5 close-out. A11y work carries forward to Sprint 6 as P1 priority. Will be addressed alongside React migration where component-level ARIA can be baked in from the start.

2026-02-28T12:00:00Z.detail: Superseded by StatsLedge UX Overhaul tickets: TKT-273. All scope covered by new tickets.
